---
title: "Priors"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
css: ../css/blog_homepage.css
include-after-body: ../javaScript/category-active.html
---
::: {.blog-description}
Updating beliefs on markets and machines
:::

```{=html}
<div class="blog-subscribe">
  <form action="https://buttondown.com/api/emails/embed-subscribe/jcp"
        method="post"
        class="subscribe-form"
        target="_blank">
    <input type="email" name="email" placeholder="your@email.com" required />
    <button type="submit">Subscribe →</button>
  </form>
</div>
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var form = document.querySelector('.blog-subscribe .subscribe-form');
  if (form) {
    form.addEventListener('submit', function() {
      if (window.goatcounter && window.goatcounter.count) {
        window.goatcounter.count({ path: 'subscribe-blog', title: 'Newsletter Signup - Blog', event: true });
      }
    });
  }
});
</script>
```
---
